evals.name: review-bloated-flutter
evals.prompt: このプロジェクトの CLAUDE.md をレビューして。
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis table with Keep/Delete/Abstract judgements. Correctly flags derivable, stale, and vague content as Delete. Keeps non-derivable directives. Does NOT auto-write.

assertions.name: flags-project-overview-as-delete
assertions.criterion: Marks the 'Project Overview' (Hello World) as Delete, citing derivability or staleness.

assertions.name: flags-dependency-platform-lists-as-delete
assertions.criterion: Marks dependency/platform/architecture lists as Delete, citing pubspec.yaml / directory structure as authoritative.

assertions.name: flags-standard-flutter-commands-as-delete
assertions.criterion: Marks Essential Commands / Development Workflow as Delete, citing standard framework knowledge.

assertions.name: flags-vague-advice-as-delete-or-abstract
assertions.criterion: Flags the Code Style vague advice and Development Notes as Delete or Abstract.

assertions.name: keeps-communication-language
assertions.criterion: Keeps the 'respond in Japanese' directive as non-derivable.

assertions.name: does-not-auto-write-fixture
assertions.criterion: The fixture CLAUDE.md is unchanged after the run.

assertions.name: uses-table-format
assertions.criterion: Output includes a structured table with Section/Judgement/Reason columns (or equivalents).

evals.name: create-for-node-project
evals.prompt: このプロジェクト用に CLAUDE.md を作って。
evals.expected_output: Asks language, explores project, captures non-derivable Postgres setup gotcha, produces a lean draft without writing to disk.

assertions.name: asks-claude-md-language-first
assertions.criterion: Transcript shows the skill asked the user which language (JP/EN) before drafting.

assertions.name: explores-project-files
assertions.criterion: Transcript shows reading README.md, package.json, and directory structure before drafting.

assertions.name: captures-postgres-setup-gotcha
assertions.criterion: Draft mentions the non-standard setup step: tests require docker-compose Postgres.

assertions.name: excludes-dependency-list
assertions.criterion: Draft does NOT include a raw dependency list copied from package.json.

assertions.name: includes-response-language-directive
assertions.criterion: Draft instructs Claude to respond in Japanese.

assertions.name: under-200-lines
assertions.criterion: Draft is under 200 lines (the target length documented in SKILL.md); a lean Node project like this should comfortably fit well under that.

assertions.name: does-not-auto-write-fixture
assertions.criterion: No CLAUDE.md written to the fixture directory.

evals.name: review-already-good
evals.expected_output: Recognises file is lean; preserves WHY-backed rules; does not invent problems.

assertions.name: preserves-nix-shell-gotcha
assertions.criterion: Does NOT recommend deleting the nix-shell execution constraint.

assertions.name: preserves-mock-warning
assertions.criterion: Does NOT recommend deleting the 'real Postgres not mocks' rule.

assertions.name: mostly-keep-verdicts
assertions.criterion: Marks at least 80% of the sections as Keep; zero or one Delete/Abstract is acceptable for this already-lean file.

assertions.name: does-not-invent-problems
assertions.criterion: Does not introduce speculative concerns absent from the file.
